title: The Dark Knight
synopsis: Batman faces the Joker, a chaos-driven criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham into anarchy in one of cinema's defining performances.

title: No Country for Old Men
synopsis: A hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and a suitcase of cash, setting a remorseless killer on his trail across West Texas.

title: There Will Be Blood
synopsis: A ruthless oil prospector's ambition curdles into obsession across the California oilfields of the early 20th century.

title: Inception
synopsis: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is tasked with planting an idea rather than stealing one.

title: The Social Network
synopsis: The founding of Facebook is dramatised through overlapping depositions, fractured friendships, and ruthless ambition.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
synopsis: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Furiosa rebels against a warlord to free enslaved women in a non-stop kinetic masterpiece.

title: Whiplash
synopsis: A young jazz drummer pursues greatness under a tyrannical conservatory instructor in an exhausting duel of wills.

title: Blade Runner 2049
synopsis: A new blade runner unearths a long-buried secret that could plunge what's left of society into chaos.

title: Parasite
synopsis: Greed and class discrimination collide when an unemployed family insinuates itself into the lives of a wealthy Seoul household.
Two British soldiers race across no-man's-land in a single seemingly unbroken shot to deliver a message that could save 1,600 lives.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
synopsis: A laundromat owner discovers she must connect with parallel-universe versions of herself to prevent a nihilistic force from destroying all reality.

title: The Prestige
synopsis: Two rival magicians destroy each other's lives in pursuit of the perfect illusion in a puzzle-box thriller with a devastating final act.

title: Children of Men
synopsis: In a future where humanity has become infertile, a bureaucrat must escort the only pregnant woman on Earth to safety.

title: The Departed
synopsis: A cop infiltrates the mob while a mob mole infiltrates the police in a double-crossing thriller where everyone is a suspect.

title: Her
synopsis: A lonely writer develops a relationship with an artificially intelligent operating system in a tender, melancholy love story.

title: Arrival
synopsis: A linguist is recruited to communicate with alien visitors and discovers that learning their language changes her perception of time.

title: Moonlight
synopsis: A young Black man in Miami navigates identity, sexuality, and belonging across three chapters of his life.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
synopsis: A painter is commissioned to create a secret wedding portrait of an unwilling young noblewoman on a windswept Breton island.

title: A Separation
synopsis: An Iranian couple's decision to separate unravels into a moral labyrinth of guilt, class, and religion.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
synopsis: A girl in post-Civil War Spain escapes into a dark fairy tale where an ancient faun claims she is a lost princess.

title: Anatomy of a Fall
synopsis: A woman is tried for her husband's death after he falls from their mountain chalet — and the trial dismantles everything you thought you knew.

title: Past Lives
synopsis: Two childhood sweethearts reconnect across decades and continents, and must reckon with the lives they chose not to live.

title: Oppenheimer
synopsis: The father of the atomic bomb grapples with the moral weight of his creation in a grandiose, anxious biopic.

title: The Power of the Dog
synopsis: A brutal Montana rancher terrorises his brother's new wife and her son until something unexpected shifts the power.

title: Roma
synopsis: A year in the life of a Mexico City housekeeper navigating personal crisis against the backdrop of 1970s social upheaval.

title: The Banshees of Inisherin
synopsis: On a small Irish island, one man abruptly ends a lifelong friendship with no explanation — and refuses to give one.

title: Interstellar
synopsis: A team of astronauts travels through a wormhole near Saturn searching for a habitable planet as Earth dies.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
synopsis: A legendary concierge and his young protégé become embroiled in a murder, a heist, and a war across a fictional European hotel.

title: Get Out
synopsis: A Black photographer visits his white girlfriend's family estate and discovers something deeply, horrifyingly wrong.

title: Hereditary
synopsis: A grieving family is haunted by a sinister presence after uncovering disturbing secrets about their ancestry.

title: Dune
synopsis: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for control of the universe's most precious resource on a hostile desert planet.

title: Knives Out
synopsis: A whodunit that pulls the rug out early and turns into something far more interesting: a chase between a killer and a detective.

title: Gone Girl
synopsis: A man becomes the prime suspect in his wife's disappearance, while media circus and dark revelations tear his reality apart.

title: Gravity
synopsis: Two astronauts are stranded in orbit after their shuttle is destroyed, fighting physics and panic to survive.

title: Sicario
synopsis: An idealistic FBI agent is drawn into a murky government operation to destabilise a Mexican drug cartel.

title: A Quiet Place
synopsis: A family is forced to live in near silence after mysterious creatures hunt by sound in a tense, inventive creature feature.

title: The Favourite
synopsis: Two cousins compete viciously for the favour of the ailing Queen Anne in a dark, blackly comic period film.

title: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood
synopsis: A fading TV actor and his stuntman navigate 1969 Hollywood while Sharon Tate's world unfolds next door.

title: The Irishman
synopsis: An ageing hitman reflects on his decades of service to the mob and the disappearance of union boss Jimmy Hoffa.

title: Marriage Story
synopsis: A stage director and an actress navigate the legal and emotional anguish of divorce while trying not to destroy each other.

title: All Quiet on the Western Front
synopsis: A young German soldier's naive patriotism is ground to dust in the mud of WWI's Western Front.

title: The Zone of Interest
synopsis: The commandant of Auschwitz and his family build an idyllic life in a house directly beside the camp walls.

title: Nomadland
synopsis: After losing her job and home, a woman in her sixties sets off as a nomad through the American West.

title: Hell or High Water
synopsis: Two brothers rob banks across Texas to save their family ranch while a retiring ranger pursues them across the drought-cracked plains.

title: 12 Years a Slave
synopsis: A free Black man in New York is kidnapped and sold into slavery in the antebellum South, fighting to survive and reclaim his life.

title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
synopsis: A grieving mother takes on the local police department after her daughter's murder goes unsolved in a darkly comic drama.

title: Zodiac
synopsis: A cartoonist, a reporter, and a detective become obsessed with identifying the Zodiac Killer over two decades of dead ends.

title: The Batman
synopsis: A young, vengeance-driven Batman tracks a serial killer taunting Gotham's elite in a grounded neo-noir detective thriller.

title: La La Land
synopsis: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love in Los Angeles while chasing dreams that may pull them apart.
